sglang.title: Fix grid size in Triton decoding kernel
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix issue mentioned in #1935.
python -m sglang.bench_one_batch --batch-size 128 --input 128 --output 128 --model meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct --attention-backend triton

Prefill. latency: 0.37300 s, throughput:  43925.00 token/s
Decode.  latency: 0.01022 s, throughput:  12529.66 token

sglang.title: Add concurrency option for benchmark
sglang.author: cermeng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
There could be a load balancer above the server to control the request traffic since the server can't reject requests. This pr can simulate this situation. Code borrowed from vllm-project/vllm#9390

Modifications

add an option --max-concurrency to bench_serving.py
make sure there will no

sglang.title: [router] cache-aware load-balancing router v1
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Related to #1732
This PR finishes the first version of cache-aware load-balancing router. For long shared prefix data, It can achieve 2x throughput compared with existing round-robin DP controller.
Usage
The router offers two modes:
1. Co-launch workers and router
This will be a drop-in r

vllm.title: [CI/Build] For ppc64le, disabled tests for now and addressed space issues
vllm.author: npanpaliya
vllm.bodyExcerpt: For ppc64le, vllm tests have been failing due to which the build and test job is failing. For now, we have disabled the tests so that atleast build can be enabled for ppc64le, while we work on the tests failure. This PR also addresses the CI agent disk space issues.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Avoid import AttentionMetadata explicitly in Mllama and fix openvino import
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Since mllama is also supported on CPU backend, import FlashAttentionMetadata and XFormersMetadata on CPU backend will cause import error due to missing packages.
This PR modifies masked attention implementation selection to use _Backend instead of attn_metadata
Also fix broken kernel test due to imp

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix the LoRA weight sharding in ColumnParallelLinearWithLoRA
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add  comments for better understanding
 Add some LoRA tests to distributed tests(refer to :#10352 (comment))

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Print running script to enhance CI log readability
vllm.author: jeejeelee
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Some tests in CI involve executing Python scripts, making it difficult to quickly identify which script is causing failure. It is recommended to print script information before running such tests to help quickly locate the corresponding script.
@DarkLight1337

vllm.title: Revert "[CI/Build] Print running script to enhance CI log readability"
vllm.author: youkaichao
